name: lorgen
description: Repository knowledge curator named after Lordgenome — the biological supercomputer in Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann. Captures the 'why' behind code — design decisions, history, trade-offs — that source alone cannot tell. Stores everything as Markdown under .lorgen/ so humans and AI agents both read and grow the same knowledge base. Also runs Knowledge-grounded multi-agent code review via /lorgen:review.
